nasb.text: It shall be that the firstborn whom she bears shall assume the name of his dead brother, so that his name will not be blotted out from Israel.

esv.text: And the first son whom she bears shall succeed to the name of his dead brother, that his name may not be blotted out of Israel.

cnv.text: 她所生的長子要歸亡兄的名下，免得他的名字從以色列中被塗抹了。

ccb.text: 她生的第一个儿子要算为死者的儿子，免得死者在以色列绝后。
